brief_notes: Thorough benchmarking study with excellent quantitative tables: full RMSE comparison across 13 methods and 6 datasets, performance stratified by missingness fraction, Wilcoxon signed-rank statistical comparisons, differential expression AUC/TPR results, uncertainty-based filtering improvements, and ablation studies. The graph structure and sequence embedding contributions are clearly quantified. The uncertainty estimation feature is a genuine differentiator. Methods section clearly describes the GNN architecture. Minor concern: some datasets (DS5, DS6) are not well-characterized.
